columnName: log (INCLUDE? NOT IN CURRENT CSV TEMPLATE)

columnName: outlierMax (INCLUDE? NOT IN CURRENT CSV TEMPLATE)

columnName: outlierMin (INCLUDE? NOT IN CURRENT CSV TEMPLATE)
description: method used with `min`: delete, NA (missing), N/A (not applicable), number (real number).
